touches.ai_summary: Aiden Adeyemi submitted an inbound demo request via the website form. Expressed interest in automating sales workflows to improve rep productivity. Mentioned current manual processes are slowing down the team. Request routed to AE for follow-up.

12-minute qualification call with Aiden Adeyemi, Head of Sales at CompassHealth. Discussed current pain points around manual data entry and lack of workflow automation across their 7-person sales team. Aiden confirmed budget authority and timeline (looking to implement within 60 days). Identified use case: rep productivity through automation. No competing solutions currently in evaluation.

questions_asked.question: What's the biggest challenge your sales team is facing right now?
questions_asked.answer: Manual data entry is eating up 4-5 hours per rep per week. We need to automate repetitive tasks so the team can focus on selling.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: I can drive this decision on the sales side. Michael Bennett from IT will need to sign off on the technical integration, but I own the budget.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs. We'll review your specific stack on the demo.

next_steps: Send proposal with unlimited automation tier pricing
Loop in Michael Bennett for technical review

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with proposal for 7 seats on unlimited automation plan at $5,000 ACV (33.8% discount applied). Aiden responded positively, confirmed he's reviewing internally with finance and will bring Michael Bennett into the conversation for technical validation. Asked about implementation timeline and onboarding support.

questions_asked.question: What does the onboarding process look like and how long does it typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Standard onboarding is 2 weeks with dedicated CSM support. We'll customize workflows to match your team's processes.

next_steps: Schedule technical validation call with Michael Bennett

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to confirm next steps and finalize terms. Aiden acknowledged receipt and mentioned he's working through internal approvals. Noted he'd like to move forward but needs a few more days to align with stakeholders. Michael Bennett has reviewed the technical specs and has no blockers. Pricing and contract terms are being reviewed by finance.
next_steps: Follow up early next week for final approval
